form.formComment: Has been in the minors the last two, the latest showing strong pace early but gathered in and finished a neck second over 350m this track in 19.50. Comes through a solid form race. Expected to feature.

form.formComment: Showed good improvement when second behind Bonded at this track last start over 350m (19.75). Has to be respected.

form.formComment: Last start finished 5th on April 2 over 400m at Warragul behind Invictus Harmony beaten 4 lengths (23.34) in a Rank Limit - Grade 5. Has ability and worth including.

form.formComment: Working her way into winning form after her success on March 9 at this track over 350m. Last start was fifth over 350m in 19.81, behind Bonded. Major threat on best form.
